nasb.text: Now Jehoram the son of Ahab became king over Israel at Samaria in the eighteenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, and reigned twelve years.

esv.text: In the eighteenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, Jehoram the son of Ahab became king over Israel in Samaria, and he reigned twelve years.

cnv.text: 猶大王約沙法第十八年，亞哈的兒子約蘭在撒瑪利亞作王，統治以色列；他作王共有十二年。

ccb.text: 犹大王约沙法执政第十八年，亚哈的儿子约兰在撒玛利亚登基做以色列王，执政十二年。
